columns.description: Postal code or 9999 for all postcodes in a municipality

columns.description: Municipality code or 9999 for fixed rate regardless of municipality

columns.description: Quantum limit. Start quantum in kg.

columns.name: TilleggContainer
columns.description: Amount per ton for additional container rate

columns.description: Amount per hour for waiting time rate

columns.name: SatsSugebil
columns.description: Amount per ton for diesel rate
